topic: mechanization and wine production cost structure
trigger_keywords: factor humano tiene un impacto directo en el precio de producción del vino
factores humanos tiene un impacto directo en el precio de producción del vino

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A producer chooses a given level of mechanization for vineyard or winery operations.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Machinery replaces some manual labour but introduces capital, maintenance, fuel, and depreciation costs whose effect depends on scale and utilization.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The level of mechanization directly changes the production cost structure and may reduce unit cost at suitable scale without guaranteeing lower cost in every operation.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Mechanization changes the balance between labour and capital costs, so scale and equipment utilization determine its effect on production cost.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
